channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: WebSockets vs SSE vs Polling: Pick Fast
item.description: Cut real-time transport choice from days to 90 seconds — latency, cost, and code differences for WebSocket, SSE, and long polling in 2026

item.title: RAG in prod: what tutorials omit
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 80% with Redis caching, circuit breakers, and gunicorn gevent workers — the real levers most tutorials skip.

item.title: Big tech burnout: what actually drives exits
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech jobs not for salary but for systems that break under real load — here’s how three hidden patterns cause burnout and how to fix them in 2026

item.title: Cut AWS carbon 25% without CPU hikes
item.description: Cut Scope 2 emissions 35% without adding latency — how we moved API calls to the greenest hours in us-east-1 using Node 20, Spot instances, and WattTime’s carbon API

item.title: Leverage local pay in global remote roles
item.description: Negotiate remote pay 3x higher — cost-of-living adjustments, stale salary bands, and the productivity argument that actually works in 2026

item.title: Set max pool size too low? Your app is slower
item.description: Reduce API latency 60% by sizing connection pools correctly — new research on 3 production systems shows how most teams misconfigure pg-pool, HikariCP, and pool_size in 2026.

item.title: Vector DB vs brute force: the 50ms rule
item.description: Cut similarity search 75% with brute-force Postgres vs 50ms vector DBs — latency benchmarks, costs, and the 50ms rule you can test in 30 minutes.

item.title: Understand what AI misses in your code
item.description: Cut AI PR review time 50% by measuring context gaps first — dependency heatmaps, OpenTelemetry traces, and tribal conventions you’re not capturing. Tools like depcruise, OpenTelemetry v1.30, and semgrep v1.60 show what AI misses.

item.title: Degree? No. Senior engineer? Yes.
item.description: Senior engineer without CS degree: the 41% callback rate for self-taught devs proves the myth wrong. Learn connection pooling, Redis 7.2 tuning, and PostgreSQL 14 knobs to hit senior level.

item.title: AI’s impact on non-traditional dev teams
item.description: Ship your first product in 28 minutes with AI tools tested on real teams in 2026 — latency benchmarks, security catches, and the one hidden cost most teams miss.

item.title: Skip LinkedIn: build the portfolio remote teams
item.description: Build a portfolio that EU recruiters actually open: live endpoints, IaC, and 500 ms latency from Nairobi. Costs under $12/month and gets interviews faster than LinkedIn spam.

item.title: Instrument LLM pipelines: what breaks in prod
item.description: Cut AI pipeline outages 78% by instrumenting raw model calls, tokenization, and rate limits. OpenTelemetry 1.27 patterns that catch prompt drift, GPU memory pressure, and provider throttling.

item.title: Over-engineering’s $12k/year tax
item.description: Cut AWS costs 39% and latency 76% by removing Kafka, GraphQL, and event sourcing — the real cost of over-engineering and how to measure it.

item.title: Profile 5G backend calls in 2026
item.description: Cut mobile backend errors 80% by profiling 5G latency — DNS, TCP, TLS breakdowns, DoH failover, undici pool tuning in Node 20 LTS.

item.title: No CS degree? No problem
item.description: Senior engineer without a CS degree? Learn the real skills that matter—connection pooling, caching, and observing production systems. Real case studies, benchmarks, and actionable steps.

item.title: Choose the Right Realtime Protocol in 30 Minutes
item.description: Pick the right realtime protocol in 5 minutes — latency, cost, and browser support compared for WebSocket, SSE, and long polling (2026 data).

item.title: AI pair programmers: what 15k devs shipped in 2026
item.description: Ship a SaaS in hours not weeks using Next.js 15, tRPC, Drizzle & Vercel — the 2026 stack that turns AI pair programmers into real products.

item.title: RAG in prod: the missing checklist
item.description: The goal was simple: reduce ticket volume by 40% within six months without adding headcount.

item.title: Cut cloud carbon 45% without sacrificing speed
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 45% without sacrificing speed — real AWS cost and latency numbers from a health-tech rebuild. Includes code, benchmarks, and the one misconfiguration that wasted 12% energy.

item.title: Negotiate pay: FX vs local costs
item.description: Negotiate remote pay in 2026 with a free Python CLI that adjusts for FX and local cost of living — saves 3–4 hours per negotiation and increases final offers by 14–99%
